assertions.title: Remote re-ingest behavior is explicit and tested

steps.action: Run scoped xcodebuild tests for OpenBurnBarTests/RemoteSyncWatermarkTests
steps.expected: Remote re-ingest of same logical key is deterministic, duplicate-free, and correction updates converge
steps.observed: test_remoteInsert_allowsReinsertOfSameKey and test_remoteInsert_updatesWhenCorrected both passed (xcodebuild log lines 13349-13352)

steps.action: Run sqlite remote canonical-key duplicate audit
steps.expected: No duplicate remote canonical rows for same (provider, sessionId, model, sourceDeviceId)
steps.observed: Duplicate audit query returned zero rows (sqlite evidence section 'Remote canonical-key duplicate audit')

steps.expected: Higher-confidence remote corrections replace lower-confidence rows and do not downgrade exact rows

assertions.title: Remote download watermark advances only after durable success

steps.action: Run watermark commit-boundary tests in RemoteSyncWatermarkTests
steps.expected: Watermark remains unchanged without commit and advances only after successful commit
Durable watermark table and primary-key/index support exist
steps.observed: remote_sync_watermarks schema and indexes present, including primary-key autoindex (sqlite evidence lines 4-17)

assertions.title: Watermark scope is account-aware and collection-safe

steps.action: Run account/collection watermark isolation tests in RemoteSyncWatermarkTests
steps.expected: Watermarks are isolated per account and per collection scope
steps.observed: test_watermark_perAccountIsolation, test_watermark_perCollectionIsolation, and test_watermark_fetchAllForAccount passed (xcodebuild log lines 13365-13368 and 13359-13360)

steps.expected: Scope key includes accountUid+collectionKind and account index exists
steps.observed: PRAGMA/index outputs show accountUid+collectionKind primary key and account index remote_sync_watermarks_account_idx (sqlite evidence lines 12-17)

frictions.description: Scoped xcodebuild produced pre-existing compiler warnings in RemoteSyncWatermarkTests for redundant 'try try' expressions.
frictions.resolution: Warnings were non-fatal; all assigned tests still passed in the same run.

summary: Tested 4 assigned assertions with scoped RemoteSyncWatermarkTests plus sqlite schema/audit checks; all 4 assertions passed.
